parameterGroups.label: Input
parameterGroups.rationale: Trigger input -- when Value changes, a new random value is generated and sent.

gaps.question: When does the random value get generated? On every setValue() call (every time Value changes), or only on a rising edge (0->1 transition)? Is the input Value used as a seed or just as a trigger?
gaps.context: Users need to know what triggers new random output and whether the input value matters.

gaps.question: What random distribution is used? Uniform 0..1? Is it the JUCE Random class or a different PRNG?
gaps.context: Affects the output characteristics users can expect.

notes: Simple single-parameter control node. No IsPolyphonic flag. The description is very terse ('creates a random value'). It likely generates a random 0..1 value whenever triggered, making it useful for randomising parameters on each trigger event.
